productDisplayName: Puma Men's Tarun White Navy Silver Red Shoe
description: Created with the latest DuoCell technology, the Tarun range of shoes from puma is designed for superior running performance. With sleek, stylish looks and a streamlined design, this shoe looks great when teamed with casual wear too.Upper Synthetic upper for protection and durability Perforated panels on the upper for breathability Tonal stitch details throughout for added style Mesh panels around the ankles for enhanced ventilation and dry, fresh comfort for the feet Formstripe on the sides for added structure Lace-ups for snug Fit Cushioned collar and tongue for plush comfort Logo on the tongue to create a fashion statement Midsole Full-length CMEVA midsole for cushioning and shock absorption Outsole DuoCELL technology in the heel for cushioning and shock absorption Outsole with aggressive multi-directional grooves and circular lugs for better grip and stability when running
